text.title: AI Accessibility Tool Landscape
text.summary: AI-powered accessibility tools by category, integration points across the development lifecycle, and capability comparison for 2026.

list.item: axe DevTools Pro — AI suggestions, issue prioritization, fix chatbot; $$$
Deque axe Enterprise — intelligent false-positive reduction, AI fix recommendations; $$$
Level Access — Ask Level AI chatbot for WCAG Q&A; no programmatic scan API; $$$
Evinced — AI-powered continuous testing; REST API for CI/CD integration; $$$
Siteimprove — enterprise monitoring with AI trend analysis; REST API; $$$
AudioEye — AI remediation with human oversight; not overlay-based; $$
Accessibility Insights (Microsoft) — code fix recommendations, automated guidance; free
WAVE — visual feedback with annotations; free browser extension
Lighthouse — performance + a11y scoring with AI insights; free (Chrome DevTools)
Stark — contrast checking, vision simulation, AI suggestions; free/$
axe-playwright — headless WCAG scanning in CI; OSS
pa11y-ci — batch URL scanning in CI pipelines; OSS
jest-axe — unit-level accessibility assertions; OSS
eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y — static JSX a11y linting; OSS
Design: Figma (Stark plugin), Adobe XD (built-in checker), Sketch (contrast plugins)
Development: VS Code (axe Linter), JetBrains (inspections), ESLint (jsx-a11y), Storybook (a11y addon)
Testing: Playwright (axe-playwright), Cypress (cypress-axe), Jest (jest-axe)
CI/CD: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI (pa11y), Jenkins, CircleCI
Issue-level AI: tools attached to individual audit issues; one-click fix suggestions without context switching
VPAT generation: draft in seconds vs. hours of manual work
False positive reduction: 30–40% down to 10–15%
In-IDE hints: VS Code and JetBrains real-time a11y linting
Alt text generators: Azure Computer Vision, Google Vision AI, OpenAI GPT-4V, Claude
Caption tools: 3Play Media (AI + human, 99% accuracy), Rev.ai (80–90%)
